recommendations.title: Harold and Maude
recommendations.overview: A deadpan young man obsessed with death meets an eccentric septuagenarian who teaches him to live life to the fullest.

recommendations.title: Being There
recommendations.overview: A simple-minded gardener named Chance has spent all his life in the Washington D.C. house of an old man. When the man dies, Chance is put out on the street with no knowledge of the world except what he has learned from television.

recommendations.title: The Last Detail
recommendations.overview: Two Navy men are ordered to bring a young offender to prison, but decide to show him one last good time along the way.

recommendations.title: Coming Home
recommendations.overview: In 1968 California, a Marine officer's wife falls in love with a former high school classmate who suffered a paralyzing combat injury in the war.

recommendations.title: Shampoo
recommendations.overview: On Election Day, 1968, irresponsible hairdresser and ladies' man George Roundy is too busy cutting hair and dealing with his girlfriends and mistress Felicia Karpf, whose husband Lester is having an affair with his ex-girlfriend Jackie.

recommendations.title: Training Day
recommendations.overview: On his first day on the job as a narcotics officer, a rookie cop works with a rogue detective who isn't what he appears.

recommendations.title: The French Connection
recommendations.overview: Tough narcotics detective 'Popeye' Doyle is in hot pursuit of a suave French drug dealer who may be the key to a huge heroin-smuggling operation.

recommendations.title: Who Killed Captain Alex?
recommendations.overview: Recognized as Uganda’s first action film, Who Killed Captain Alex? is about the aftermath of a police raid in Kampala in which a police captain is killed.

recommendations.title: Justice
recommendations.overview: A young detective seeks the help of a discharged police officer, giving him the chance to reclaim his old life in exchange for solving a bank raid case.

recommendations.title: An Eye for an Eye
recommendations.overview: Sean Kane is forced to resign from the San Francisco Police Department's Narcotics Division when he goes berserk after his partner is murdered. He decides to fight alone and follows a trail of drug traffickers into unexpected high places.
